name: Kombucha Brewer
desc: Brew your own delicious, probiotic-rich kombucha at home with this sleek countertop fermenter. Temperature-controlled, easy to use, and beautiful enough to display on your kitchen counter. Perfect for fermentation beginners and enthusiasts alike.

name: Sana Sleep Mask
desc: Sana is a smart sleep mask designed by Office for Product Design. It helps you relax and quickly fall into deep, restorative sleep using gentle light therapy and soft pressure. The ultra-soft memory foam material contours perfectly to your face, blocking out 100% of light while remaining completely comfortable throughout the night.

name: Engineered Sound Pro
desc: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, and audiophile-grade sound drivers. Foldable design for easy travel. Compatible with all Bluetooth 5.0 devices. Comes with a premium hard-shell carrying case.

name: Purified Air Design
desc: Compact desktop air purifier with HEPA filtration. Removes 99.97% of airborne particles, allergens, dust, and odors. Ultra-quiet operation at just 25dB. Covers up to 150 sq ft. Perfect for your home office or bedroom.

name: Arc Desk Lamp
desc: Minimalist LED desk lamp with touch dimmer and 5 color temperature settings from warm candlelight to cool daylight. USB-C charging port on the base. Memory function remembers your last setting.

name: Nordic Side Table
desc: Solid oak side table with a powder-coated metal frame. Simple, clean Scandinavian design that fits any interior. Easy to assemble. Dimensions: 45cm diameter, 55cm height. Available in natural oak and walnut finish.
